changes: The minimum aetherpool gear strength enhancement from opening silver coffers has been increased from +1 to +5 (Palace of the Dead).
The success rate of aetherpool gear strength enhancement when opening silver coffers before floor 101 has been increased (Palace of the Dead).
Enhancement to aetherpool gear strength when defeating a boss has been increased from +1 to +10 (Palace of the Dead).
Aetherpool gear strength is now guaranteed to be enhanced upon defeating bosses on every boss floor, and upon completing floor 200 (Palace of the Dead).
Defeated enemies will now drop sustaining potions (Palace of the Dead).
Purify: MP cost has been reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
Recuperate: MP cost has been reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
Salted Earth: Healing over time potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Salted Earth: Damage over time potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Salted Earth: Delay until Salt and Darkness becomes usable has been reduced from 1 to 0.8 seconds.
Salt and Darkness: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Dragon Kick: Potency has been increased from 4,500 to 5,500.
Twin Snakes: Potency has been increased from 5,000 to 6,000.
Demolish: Potency has been increased from 5,500 to 6,500.
Leaping Opo: Potency has been increased from 6,500 to 7,000.
Rising Raptor: Potency has been increased from 7,000 to 7,500.
Pouncing Coeurl: Potency has been increased from 7,500 to 8,000.
Phantom Rush: Reduction in potency for enemies after the first target has been removed.
Earth's Reply: Potency has been increased from 3,000 plus 25% of compiled damage to 4,000 plus 25% of compiled damage.
Earth's Reply: Cure potency has been increased from 6,000 plus 50% of compiled damage to 8,000 plus 50% of compiled damage.
Geirskogul: Increase to damage suffered caused by Life of the Dragon has been reduced from 25% to 15%.
Forked Raiju: Fleeting Raiju Ready effect duration has been reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Meikyo Shisui: Meikyo Shisui effect duration has been reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Backlash: Amount of damage dealt absorbed as HP has been reduced from 100% to 50%.
Encore of Light: Reduction of target's MP has been reduced from 5,000 to 4,000.
Maximum HP: Maximum HP has been increased from 57,000 to 58,500.
Scattergun: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Fountain: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Fountainfall: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Fan Dance: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Xenoglossy: Amount of HP absorbed when player HP is above 50% has been reduced from 100% to 50%.
Wreath of Ice: Reduction to damage taken has been reduced from 25% to 20%.
Necrotize: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Maximum HP: Maximum HP has been reduced from 55,500 to 54,000.
Smudge: Recast time has been increased from 12 to 15 seconds.
Miracle of Nature: Reduction of target's MP has been reduced from 2,500 to 1,000.
Afflatus Purgation: Potency has been reduced from 20,000 to 16,000.
Maximum HP: Maximum HP has been reduced from 55,500 to 54,000.
Celestial River: No longer reduces healing potency of nearby enemies by 30%.
Phlegma III: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Psyche: Potency for enemies more than 3 yalms away has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.

new_content.name: Pilgrim's Traverse
new_content.description: A new deep dungeon scheduled for release in Patch 7.35.

new_content.name: Phaenna
new_content.description: The next destination for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

new_content.name: Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures
new_content.description: Sidequests scheduled for release in Patch 7.35.

new_content.name: Yok Huy Allied Society Quests
new_content.description: Allied society quests scheduled for release in Patch 7.35.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration Initiative
new_content.description: A system for participating in stellar missions and projects on Phaenna, including mech ops and stellar successes.

new_content.name: Phantom Weapon Enhancement
new_content.description: A battle system feature allowing players to enhance phantom weapons through quests.

housing.name: Docking Station Cover
housing.description: A freestanding roof to shelter one's rover from natural hazards.

housing.name: Cosmic Circumferbench
housing.description: A marvel of space-saving public infrastructure, this lamppost incorporates 360-degree seating area.

housing.name: Cosmoseat
housing.description: A futuristic bench developed for use on distant stars. Though visually appealing, its unyielding surface has led more than one overworked initiative member to question whether the future must needs be "such a pain in the arse."

housing.name: Cosmokitchen Partition
housing.description: This futuristic partition incorporates a compact pantry and sink, as well as a helpful memo reminding users that even in the great expanse, everyone can smell your unwashed dishes.

housing.name: Portable Exoterminal
housing.description: Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this device was designed for the purpose of easily sending mass updates to exotablets whether at camp or in the field─though some Loporrits have been caught red-pawed using it to design frivolous games.
